ALAW_PCM_64K - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
Alaw PCM (mimetype: pcma)
ALLOCATION_CONFIRMED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.AllocationEvent
This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a ResourceContainer.confirm().
AllocationEvent - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
This event is sent when ResourceContainer.confirm() completes.
AllocationEventListener - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
An application must register an AllocationEventListener to be notified of a ResourceContainer.confirm() completion.
AllocationEventNotifier - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.
AMR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
AMR (narrow band)
AMR_WB - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
AMR wideband
ANSWER_GENERATED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManagerEvent
EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.processSdpOffer(byte[]) has completed.
ANSWER_PROCESSED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManagerEvent
EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.processSdpAnswer(byte[]) has completed.
anyActiveStream - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
Virtual URI, representing any stream that is active.
anyStream - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
A virtual URI, representing one of the incoming streams, at the mixer's choice.
APPEND - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Indicates that recording should append to the end of an existing TVM rather than overwrite it.
AUDIO - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
This Configuration supports simple audio mixing.
AUDIO_CLOCKRATE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
The desired clock rate (or sample rate) of the audio encoding
The value is an Integer, in Hz.
AUDIO_CODEC - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Parameter identifying the audio codec used.
AUDIO_CODEC - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Parameter identifying the audio Codec used for a new recording.
AUDIO_EVENTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
This Configuration supports audio mixing, plus the events related to the active talkers.
AUDIO_FMTP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
A string-valued list of detailed audio codec parameters, in the format described by rfc4566.
AUDIO_MAX_BITRATE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
The maximum accepted bitrate for the audio stream.
AUDIO_VIDEO - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
This Configuration support mixing of audio and video.
AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
This Configuration supports the features of MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO, plus a VideoRenderer.
AUTO_START - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialog
If set to Boolean.TRUE, the dialog will start immediately and automatically when it is prepared.

BASIC - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.NetworkConnection

BEEP_LENGTH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder

DOCUMENT_MAX_STALE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialog
Indicates that the file is willing to use content that has exceeded its expiration time (cf. max-stale in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).

DTMF_CLAMP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MixerAdapter
This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer.
DTMF_CONVERSION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.NetworkConnection
Contains what NetworkConnection.BASIC contains, plus a SignalDetector and a SignalGenerator for forwarding DTMFs carried by the signaling channel (advanced feature).
DTMF_D - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalConstants
Value for DTMF D
DTMF_HASH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalConstants
Value for DTMF #
DTMF_STAR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalConstants
Value for DTMF *
DTMFCLAMP_VOLUME - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MixerAdapter
This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer, and include a volume control.
DURATION_EXCEEDED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.PlayerEvent
Play ended because the maximum play duration time has been reached.
DURATION_EXCEEDED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.RecorderEvent
Record ended because the maximum record duration time has been reached.
DURATION_EXCEEDED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Complete because total duration timeout (MAX_DURATION) exceeded.

EMPTY - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MixerAdapter
This config is a pass-through, no media processing is performed on any stream.
ENABLED_EVENTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player

ENABLED_EVENTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder

ENABLED_EVENTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector

ENABLED_EVENTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer

END_OF_PLAY_LIST - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.PlayerEvent

END_OF_SPEECH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SpeechRecognitionEvent
A predefined pattern that matches the end of a speech sequence.
END_OF_SPEECH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
Trigger when end of speech has been detected (ie. final timeout popped).
END_OF_SPEECH_DETECTED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
SpeechDetector stopped because end of speech has been detected.
ERROR_EVENT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialogEvent

FILE_FORMAT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder

FILE_MAX_AGE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http.HttpFilePlayerConstants

FILE_MAX_STALE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http.HttpFilePlayerConstants

FileFormatConstants - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup

FINAL_TIMEOUT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants

FOREVER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.Resource

FORMAT_3G2 - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.FileFormatConstants

FORMAT_3GP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.FileFormatConstants

G

G723_1B - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
G.723 codec
Valid fmtp values, per rfc 3555, paragraph 4.1.3: "bitrate=6.3" or "bitrate="5.3" "annexa=yes" (default) or "annexa=no" Those values may be assigned to Recorder.AUDIO_FMTP.
G729_A - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
G.729 codec
Valid fmtp values, per rfc 3555, paragraph 4.1.9: "annexb=yes" (default) or "annexb=no" Those values may be assigned to Recorder.AUDIO_FMTP.

getSupportedActions() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported Actions.
getSupportedEventTypes() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported EventTypes.
getSupportedFeatures() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfig
Return the various features supported by the MediaObjects created using this template.
getSupportedParameters() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported Parameters.
getSupportedQualifiers() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported Qualifiers.
getSupportedTriggers() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported Triggers.
getSupportedValues() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.SupportedFeatures
Provide the Set of supported Values.
getTag() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SpeechRecognitionEvent
Return the tag associated to the user input, as defined by SISR.
getThisJoinable() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinEvent
Return a reference to the object on which joinInitiate was called.
getTrigger() - Method in class javax.media.mscontrol.resource.RTC
Return the Trigger that defines the trigger condition for this RTC.
getType() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinableStream
Returns the enumerated type of the stream (audio, video, ...).
getType() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
A string to describe the layout.
getURI() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaObject
Return a URI that uniquely identifies this object.
getUserAgentSessionDescription() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManager
This method gives access to the User Agent session description for media streams.
getUserInput() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SpeechRecognitionEvent
Return the recognized utterance, as a String.
GSM - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
GSM codec
GSM - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.FileFormatConstants
GSM file format.

H

H263 - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
H263_1998 - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
H264 - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
hasStream(JoinableStream.StreamType) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfig
Tells if the given stream type (audio, video, etc) is defined.
HTTP_METHOD - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http.HttpFileRecorderConstants
Indicates witch http method to use for the record.
HttpFilePlayerConstants - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
This interface defines constants that can be used to configure the http file player.
HttpFileRecorderConstants - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
This interface defines constants that can be used to configure the http file recorder.

I

INFERRED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
If Player.AUDIO_CODEC is set to this Value, it indicates that the encoding must be read from the file header.
INFERRED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.FileFormatConstants
If Player.FILE_FORMAT or Recorder.FILE_FORMAT is set to this Value, it indicates that the container type must be inferred from the file name extension (.wav -> WAV_FORMAT, etc..).
INFINITE_LOOP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr
 
INITIAL_TIMEOUT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
Maximum time limit for first signal.
INITIAL_TIMEOUT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
Controls how long the recognizer should wait after the end of the prompt for the caller to speak before sending a Recorder event (COMPLETED, INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXPIRED, null, NO_ERROR).
INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXCEEDED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Complete because initial signal timeout (INITIAL_TIMEOUT) exceeded.
INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXPIRATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
Trigger when no speech has been detected before the initial timout popped.
INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXPIRED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
SpeechDetector stopped because no speech has been detected before the initial timout popped.
INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
Maximum time limit between consecutive signals.
INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT_EXCEEDED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Complete because inter signal timeout (INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT) exceeded.
INTER_SIGNAL_GAP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalGenerator
Pause duration between each DTMF, as a positive Integer, in milliseconds
INTERVAL - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
When REPEAT_COUNT is greater than 1, the player waits for INTERVAL milliseconds between each repetition.
IRRECOVERABLE_FAILURE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.AllocationEvent
Indicates that an irrecoverable failure occurred, like the loss of connectivity to the media server.
isSuccessful() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
 

J

javax.media.mscontrol - package javax.media.mscontrol
Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API.
javax.media.mscontrol.join - package javax.media.mscontrol.join
An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them.
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup - package javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder.
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http - package javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
Mediagroup parameters specialized for HTTP file play and record
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals - package javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer - package javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream.
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection - package javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network.
javax.media.mscontrol.resource - package javax.media.mscontrol.resource
This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources.
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common - package javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common
Manage resources that can be inserted in different ResourceContainers like MediaGroups, NetworkConnections or MixerAdapters.
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video - package javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video
Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering.
javax.media.mscontrol.spi - package javax.media.mscontrol.spi
This package provides classes and interfaces defining a Driver service provider interface (SPI).
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml - package javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server.
join(Joinable.Direction, Joinable) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable
Establish a media stream between this object and other.
Joinable - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
A Joinable is suitable for media composition.
Joinable.Direction - Enum in javax.media.mscontrol.join
Indicates a direction for the media flow.
JoinableContainer - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
JoinableDialog - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
Implements a high level of abstraction of media interaction, for example a voicexml script interpreter.
JoinableStream - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
A JoinableStream represents a media stream channel (or port), of a given type: audio, video, etc.
JoinableStream.StreamType - Enum in javax.media.mscontrol.join
Can be audio, video, or message.
JOINED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinEvent
This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a join operation.
JoinEvent - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
This event is delivered to the application upon completion of an asynchronous join operation.
JoinEventListener - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
An application must register a JoinEventListener to be notified of a joinInitiate completion.
JoinEventNotifier - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.join
Characteristics of objects able to send JoinEvent's.
JoinException - Exception in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 
JoinException(String) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinException
 
JoinException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinException
 
joinInitiate(Joinable.Direction, Joinable, Serializable) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable
Initiates the same action as Joinable.join(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable), but returns immediately, without waiting for the join completion (asynchronous operation).
JUMP_BACKWARD - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump backward by the amount specified by JUMP_TIME.
JUMP_BACKWARD_IN_PLAYLIST - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump backward the number of items indicated by JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT.
JUMP_FORWARD - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump forward by the amount specified by JUMP_TIME.
JUMP_FORWARD_IN_PLAYLIST - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump forward the number of play list items indicated by JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT.
JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Integer number of items to jump forward or backward in the play list, for either a JUMP_FORWARD_IN_PLAYLIST or JUMP_BACKWARD_IN_PLAYLIST.
JUMP_TIME - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Integer number of milliseconds by which the current play list items offset is changed by JUMP_FORWARD or JUMP_BACKWARD.
JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_END - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump to the last item in the play list.
JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_ITEM_END - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump to the end of the curent play list item.
JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_ITEM_START - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump to the start of the current play list item
JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_START - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Jump to the first item in the play list.

L

LINEAR_16BIT_128K - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
16bits, linear, 8000 samples/second, 128 kbits/s
LINEAR_16BIT_256K - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
16bits, linear, 16000 samples/second, 256kbits/s
LINEAR_8BIT_64K - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
8bits, linear, 8000 samples/second, 64kbits/s
LOCAL_URI - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialog
The session variable that defines the local uri (as per https://datatracker.ietf.org/drafts/draft-burke-vxml/ ).

M

MANUAL_TRIGGER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.ResourceEvent
The Trigger returned by ResourceEvent.getRTCTrigger() when ResourceContainer.triggerAction(Action) is called.
marshall() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfig
 
marshall() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
 
MAX_ACTIVE_INPUTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
Only this number of (loudest talking) inputs (participants) are included in the mix.
MAX_DURATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Integer indicating maximum duration of a play request.
MAX_DURATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Positive Integer indicating the maximum duration (in milliseconds) for a record.
MAX_DURATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
Maximum time duration for retrieving signals in milliseconds.
MAX_PORTS - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer
Maximum number of media objects (Joinable's) that can be joined to the Mixer.
MEDIA_SERVER_URI - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MsControlFactory
MsControlFactory property defining an URI of a media server, for example sip:ms@192.168.1.2:5060.
MediaConfig - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
This class defines the internal structure of a ResourceContainer.
MediaConfigException - Exception in javax.media.mscontrol
The class of things that go wrong during media configuration.
MediaConfigException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfigException
Constructs a MediaConfigException with a message and its origin
MediaConfigException(String) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfigException
Constructs a MediaConfigException with the specified detail message.
MediaErr - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
Definition of the most common errors, as MediaErr instances.
MediaEvent<S> - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
An event from a MediaEventNotifier.
MediaEventListener<T extends MediaEvent<?>> - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
To receive events, an application must register a class extending this interface.
MediaEventNotifier<T extends MediaEvent<?>> - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
The class of objects that can send MediaEvent to listeners
MediaException - Exception in javax.media.mscontrol
MediaException is the parent for [non-Runtime] media Exceptions
MediaException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaException
Constructs a MediaException with a message and its origin
MediaException(String) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaException
Constructs a MediaException with the specified detail message.
MediaGroup - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
Adapter class which provides the asynchronous access to media containers (files) and signals (DMTF's).
MediaMixer - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
This class is required when the application needs to mix (or add, or sum) multiple media streams into a single one.
MediaObject - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
A base class for objects that are created by a Factory, can be released, and can be parameterized.
MEDIAOBJECT_ID - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaObject
A non-mutable ID string, replacing the system-provided ID.
MediaServiceException - Exception in javax.media.mscontrol
The class of things that go wrong in MediaService methods.
MediaServiceException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaServiceException
Constructs a MediaServiceException with the specified detail message and its origin
MediaServiceException(String) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MediaServiceException
Constructs a MediaServiceException with the specified detail message.
MediaSession - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
A MediaSession is a container and factory for media objects.
MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialogEvent
Event sent by the vxml interpreter when a mid-call event arises.
MIN_DURATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Integer indicating minimum duration (in milliseconds) that constitutes a valid recording.
MixerAdapter - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
A MixerAdapter is the materialization of a "Mixer port".
mixerAdapterURIBase - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
The basename of a MixerAdapter, for insertion in a VideoLayout document.
MixerEvent - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
Defines the events sent by a Mixer
mixerStreamGroupURIBase - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
 
mixerURIBase - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
 
MOST_ACTIVE_INPUT_CHANGED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MixerEvent
The event indicates that the most ActiveInput has changed.
mostActiveStream - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video.VideoLayout
Virtual URI, representing the stream of the most active input.
MP4V_ES - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants
Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
MsControlException - Exception in javax.media.mscontrol
General purpose exception
MsControlException(String) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MsControlException
Constructs a MsControlException with the specified detail message
MsControlException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception javax.media.mscontrol.MsControlException
Constructs a MsControlException with its origin and the specified detail message
MsControlFactory - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
This factory creates MediaSessions.
MULAW_PCM_64K - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.CodecConstants

N

name - Variable in class javax.media.mscontrol.spi.PropertyInfo
The name of the property.
NETWORK_STREAM_FAILURE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManagerEvent
Event sent by the media server to indicate a hard failure on a media stream.
NetworkConnection - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
A NetworkConnection is a JoinableContainer that drives network media ports.
NO_ERROR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr
Indicates success: there was no error.
NO_ERROR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
Error returned by MediaEvent.getError() when there is no error.
NO_GRAMMAR_MATCH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SpeechRecognitionEvent
This qualifier indicates that the recognizer could not match the input with any grammar.
NO_PARAMETER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters
A typed constant to use when no parameter is required:
play("my_file.wav, myRTCs, Parameters.NO_PARAMETER);
NO_PATTERN - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
A constant to use as second argument of SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int, Parameter[], RTC[], Parameters) when no pattern is involved.
NO_QUALIFIER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.ResourceEvent
Returned when no Qualifier is applicable (for example, when an error occurred).
NO_RTC - Static variable in class javax.media.mscontrol.resource.RTC
A typed constant to use when no RTC is required:
myMediaGroup.play("my_file.wav, RTC.NO_RTC, myParameters);
NO_TERMINATION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr
 
NO_TRANSCODER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinEvent
Error sent by media server when it is unable to perform the transcoding required by the join.
NORMAL_SPEED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Set speed to normal.
NORMAL_VOLUME - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Set volume to normal.
NORMAL_VOLUME - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common.VolumeConstants
Set volume to normal.
NOT_FOUND - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr
 
NOT_SUPPORTED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr
 
NUM_SIGNALS_DETECTED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Complete because requested number of signals detected.

O

OFFER_GENERATED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManagerEvent
EventType sent by a SdpPortManager when SdpPortManager.generateSdpOffer() has completed.
OFFER_PARTIALLY_ACCEPTED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManagerEvent
ResourceEvent.getQualifier() returns this Qualifier to indicate that the offer is partially accepted (at least 1 Media description is accepted)
The application must use SdpPortManager.getMediaServerSessionDescription() to know what was accepted and what was rejected.
onEvent(JoinEvent) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.JoinEventListener
To receive Join related events, an application must register a class extending this interface.
onEvent(T) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEventListener
 
onEvent(AllocationEvent) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.AllocationEventListener
To receive Allocation related events, an application must register a class extending this interface.
OVERFLOWED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
The SignalDetector signal buffer has overflowed.

P

Parameter - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
A Parameter designates a parameter for Resource operation, like Player.MAX_DURATION.
Parameters - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol
This class is a Map of (Parameter=value) pairs.
PATTERN - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
An array of pattern Parameter's.
PATTERN_COUNT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
Number of pattern definitions supported by this SignalDetector resource.
PATTERN_MATCH - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
PATTERN_MATCH[i] is triggered when the corresponding pattern has been matched.
PATTERN_MATCHED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Array of pattern EventType's, indicating a pattern matched event.
PATTERN_MATCHING - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
The array of pattern Qualifiers.
PAUSE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Pause the current Play operation, maintaining the current position in the play list item and play list.
PAUSE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Pause the current operation on a recorder, maintaining the current position in the Media Stream being recorded.
PAUSED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.PlayerEvent
Play has been paused by RTC.
PAUSED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.RecorderEvent
Indicates that recording has been paused.
play(URI[], RTC[], Parameters) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Play the items in a play list sequentially (a composite prompt), identified by the streamIDs.
play(URI, RTC[], Parameters) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Play a single play item named by streamID.
PLAY_COMPLETED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.PlayerEvent
Completion event for the play method.
PLAY_COMPLETION - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Trigger when a Play is completed.
PLAY_START - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Trigger when a Play is started.
PLAYER - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.MediaGroup
Defines a MediaGroupConfig containing only a Player interface.
Player - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
Defines methods for playing one or more media streams.
PLAYER_RECORDER_SIGNALDETECTOR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.MediaGroup
A MediaGroupConfig containing Player, Recorder, and SignalDetector.
PLAYER_RECORDER_SIGNALDETECTOR_SIGNALGENERATOR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.MediaGroup
A MediaGroupConfig containing Player, Recorder, SignalDetector, and SignalGenerator.
PLAYER_SIGNALDETECTOR - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.MediaGroup
Defines a MediaGroupConfig containing a Player and a SignalDetector.
PlayerEvent - Interface in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup

POST_METHOD - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http.HttpFileRecorderConstants
http POST method
prepare(URL, Parameters, Map<String, Object>) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialog

prepare(String, Parameters, Map<String, Object>) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialog
Same as VxmlDialog.prepare(URL, Parameters, Map), but the vxml script is provided in line, as the first argument.
PREPARED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.vxml.VxmlDialogEvent
Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.prepare(java.net.URL, javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters, java.util.Map) request.
processSdpAnswer(byte[]) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManager
Request the Media Server to process the given SDP answer (from the remote User Agent).
processSdpOffer(byte[]) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection.SdpPortManager
Request the MediaServer to process the given SDP offer (from the remote User Agent).
PROMPT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Indicates a prompt to be played before the recording starts.
PROMPT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
Indicates a prompt to be played before the signal detection starts.
PROMPT_DONE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.SpeechDetectorConstants
Advise the Speech Detector that the prompt is finished.
PROMPT_FAILURE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.RecorderEvent
Returned by RecorderEvent.getQualifier() to indicate that the record operation was aborted because the prompt could not be played.
PROMPT_FAILURE - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetectorEvent
Returned by SignalDetectorEvent.getQualifier() to indicate that the receiveSignals operation was aborted because the prompt could not be played.

Stops all operations currently in progress on this media group.

Stop the current Play operation.
stop(boolean) - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Stops a play() operation that is running, it will terminate and send PlayerEvent.PLAY_COMPLETED.
STOP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Stop the current recording operation.
stop() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Recorder
Stops a record() operation that is running, it will terminate and send RecorderEvent.RECORD_COMPLETED.
STOP - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector
RTC Action to cause the current receiveSignals operation to stop.
stop() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalDetector

stop() - Method in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals.SignalGenerator
Stops a emitSignal() operation that is running, it will terminate and send SignalGeneratorEvent.EMIT_SIGNALS_COMPLETED.
STOP_ALL - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
Stop the current Play operation and all pending play operations in queue.
STOP_IF_BUSY - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.Player
value for BEHAVIOUR_IF_BUSY: stop any previous play.
STOPPED - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.resource.ResourceEvent

SUBMIT_TIMEOUT - Static variable in interface javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http.HttpFileRecorderConstants
